generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring input current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox position data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor velocity derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MotorAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor acceleration derived from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance GearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox velocity derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance GearboxAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox acceleration derived from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance DynamicFrictionModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic exchange of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ExchangeFrictionModelAction
]

instance DataTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Full traceability of data origin and computation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance UnifiedDashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a unified dashboard for enhancing robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to update control parameters for improving robot motion accuracy through continuous model identification"
]

instance ExchangeFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamically exchange friction models based on identification results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data origin and computation for transparency and validation"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization for monitoring robot motion accuracy"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset description"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService, DynamicFrictionModelExchangeService
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService, DynamicFrictionModelExchangeService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnifiedDashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for controlling position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque output"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining tasks with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual, as per reference model [32]."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of Purpose (FrictionDerivation singleton), Asset (Mabi described by SysML SystemModel), DataTraces (measured/simulated data for current, torque, angular velocity), Sources (sensors and simulation components), Processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB), and Models (engineering, simulation, data calculation)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; digital shadow integrates operational data and live measurements during robot operation for continuous improvement due to wear, different tools, or applications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor time series from physical to virtual."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Implementation of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) standard and SysML standard for systems modeling."
]
